products.name: High-Speed Electric Motor Generators
products.descriptor: High-speed permanent magnet motors and generators for defense, aerospace, and industrial applications

evidence.snippet: *   [High-Speed Electric Motor Generators](/high-speed-electric-motor-generators)

Permanent Magnet Motors & Generators
Designed with the smallest volume and weight due to high rotational speeds, our permanent magnet (PM) motors and generators achieve increased efficiency and high-power density over traditional gear box motors due to the use of PM rotors supported on advanced, oil-free magnetic bearings.

products.name: Enercycle™ DC-1000 Inverter
products.descriptor: DC inverter for defense and aerospace export power applications

evidence.snippet:
Enercycle™ DC - 1000 Inverter Video
](/resource/power-electronics/enercycletm-dc-1000-inverter-video)

products.name: Variable Frequency Drives
products.descriptor: Motor drives and inverters optimized for high-speed machine control with sensorless space vector modulation

evidence.snippet: *   [Active Magnetic Bearings](/active-magnetic-bearings)

Power Electronics
From electric motors to position control applications, our motor drives adjust to the needs of the process and help increase the overall efficiency of the system with key advantages that include system level design optimization, low-impedance and high-speed machine optimization, sensorless control methodology, bidirectional drive operation, low Total Harmonics Distortion, long operating life and sensorless space vector modulation.

products.name: Active Magnetic Bearings
products.descriptor: Oil-free active magnetic bearing systems for high-speed rotating machinery

evidence.snippet: *   [Active Magnetic Bearings](/active-magnetic-bearings)

Magnetic Bearings
With a team of renowned experts, Calnetix specializes in high-speed rotating machinery supported on active magnetic bearings, which increase efficiency, reduce system downtime and maintenance, and ultimately extend the life of the machine well beyond industry standards.
Learn More

products.name: Magnaforce™ High-Speed Permanent Magnet Generator
products.descriptor: Branded high-speed permanent magnet generator for ORC waste heat recovery systems

evidence.snippet: _(1) Carefree Integrated Power Module™ (IPM)/ (2) Magnaforce™ High-Speed Permanent Magnet Generator (3) Powerflux™ Magnetic Bearings and Insight™ Magnetic Bearing Controller (MBC) (4) Vericycle™ 300-AE Bidirectional Drive (5) Program Logic Controller_

products.name: Vericycle™ 300-AE Bidirectional Drive
products.descriptor: Bidirectional power electronics drive for grid-tied ORC waste heat recovery systems

evidence.snippet: _(1) Carefree Integrated Power Module™ (IPM)/ (2) Magnaforce™ High-Speed Permanent Magnet Generator (3) Powerflux™ Magnetic Bearings and Insight™ Magnetic Bearing Controller (MBC) (4) Vericycle™ 300-AE Bidirectional Drive (5) Program Logic Controller_

Global acceptance of the system necessitated the system to be configurable to meet the grid connectivity requirement of individual countries. Special control and hardware features in the Vericycle™ power electronics were designed to enable the individual functionalities. The design has been proven via the wide regional acceptance and installation of the units worldwide, including marine vessels.

products.name: Enercycle™ DC-1000
products.descriptor: SiC-based DC inverter for variable-speed motor drive applications

products.name: Enercycle™
products.descriptor: SiC-based power electronics family for high-speed motor drives

evidence.snippet: Calnetix’s integrated propulsion systems combine light weight and [power dense permanent magnet motors](/case-studies/high-performance-energy-recovery-system), and SiC based [Enercycle™ power electronics](https://www.calnetix.com/variable-frequency-drives). The integrated system can reduce energy consumption and installed size and weight, while improving reliability, operational flexibility, and meeting stringent emission standards.
